instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Borrowing your camera
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I’m going to my cousin’s birthday party this weekend, and I want to take some good photos. [1]Could I borrow your camera?[/1]||[2]I can give it back on Monday. Is that OK?[/2]||[3]Do you have any advice about taking photos indoors?[/3] The party will be in a restaurant.||[4]Would you like to come to the party too?[/4]||Thanks||Isla

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Isla,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, you can borrow my camera for the party. I’ll bring it to school on Friday.[/1]||[2]Monday isn’t a good day to give it back because I need it for an art project, but Sunday evening would be fine.[/2]||[3]My advice is to stand near the lights and not too far from the people you are photographing.[/3]||[4]I’m sorry, but I can’t come to the party because I’m visiting my uncle this weekend.[/4]||I hope she enjoys it.||Have a great time,||Nina
